title: Job Interview
opening: Good morning! Please tell me a little about yourself.

t1.prompt: Good morning! Please tell me a little about yourself.
t1.promptTranslation: Good morning! (Good morning!) Please tell me a little about yourself.

t2.prompt: That's interesting. What specific skills or experiences do you have that relate to this role?
t2.promptTranslation: That's interesting. (That's interesting.) What specific skills or experiences do you have that relate to this role?

t3.prompt: Thank you. What motivated you to apply for this position, and what do you hope to achieve here?
t3.promptTranslation: Thank you. (Thank you.) What motivated you to apply for this position, and what do you hope to achieve here?

t4.prompt: We're almost done. Could you tell me about your greatest strengths and perhaps one area you're working to improve?
t4.promptTranslation: We're almost done. (We are almost done.) Could you tell me about your greatest strengths and perhaps one area you're working to improve?

t5.prompt: Thank you for sharing that. Do you have any questions for me about the role or the company?
t5.promptTranslation: Thank you for sharing that. (Thank you for sharing that.) Do you have any questions for me about the role or the company?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat your answer?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, (Sorry,) I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat your answer?

t6.prompt: Great. It was a pleasure speaking with you. We'll be in touch soon. Goodbye!
t6.promptTranslation: Great. (Great.) It was a pleasure speaking with you. We'll be in touch soon. Goodbye!
